import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Row, functions as F, functions as udf
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, trim, lit, upper, when, coalesce, trim
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType
import re

Year = 2025

all_journals_aipp_url = "https://publishing.aip.org/publications/find-the-right-journal/"
open_access_details_url = 'https://publishing.aip.org/resources/researchers/open-science/open-access/'
kbart_file_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/American Institute of Physics (AIP)/kbart/kbart.csv'
silver_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/American Institute of Physics (AIP)/all/'

# This is the default APC. This needs to be validated before every year run
# https://publishing.aip.org/resources/researchers/open-science/open-access/
APC_OA = 1800
APC_GOLD = 2750
APC_HYBRID = 3800

# The publication fee for Open Access articles in AIP Advances is $1500 USD
# The publication fee for Open Access articles in all other Gold Open Access AIP Publishing titles is $2750 USD.
#  The $3500 USD fee for for Publishing Open Access in our Subscription Journals through Author Select (hybrid)

# update this sheet for any ndw journal added
society_path = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/American Institute of Physics (AIP)/society/society.csv'

# This methid is used to extract print and online issn details form 'https://publishing.aip.org/publications/find-the-right-journal/
def extract_issn(issn_info):
    if issn_info is None:
        return None, None
    
    # Define patterns for print and online ISSN
    #print_issn_pattern = r"Print:\s*([\d-]+)"
    #online_issn_pattern = r"Online(?: only)?:\s*([\d-]+)"
    print_issn_pattern = r"Print:\s*([0-9]{4}-[0-9]{3}[0-9X]+)"
    online_issn_pattern = r"Online(?: only)?:\s*([0-9]{4}-[0-9]{3}[0-9X]+)"

    # Extract ISSNs using regex
    print_issn = re.search(print_issn_pattern, issn_info)
    online_issn = re.search(online_issn_pattern, issn_info)

    # Return ISSNs or None if not found
    return (
        print_issn.group(1) if print_issn else None,
        online_issn.group(1) if online_issn else None

# Define the schema this will be used to extract journl data from https://publishing.aip.org/publications/find-the-right-journal/
schema = StructType([
    StructField("title", StringType(), True),
    StructField("title_url", StringType(), True),
    StructField("access_type", StringType(), True),
    StructField("issn_info", StringType(), True),
    StructField("topics", StringType(), True),
    StructField("impact_factor", StringType(), True),
    StructField("citations", StringType(), True),
    StructField("frequency", StringType(), True),
    StructField("submit_url", StringType(), True)
])

# Define the UDF, specifying the return type as StructType with print and electronic ISSN fields
extract_issn_udf = F.udf(extract_issn, StructType([
    StructField("print_issn", StringType(), True),
    StructField("electronic_issn", StringType(), True)

# Read the jouranl information from kbart
kbart_df = spark.read.csv(kbart_file_path, header=True, inferSchema=True)
# Remove rows where publication_type is not "serial".
# Ensure last_date_online is blank (null).
# Ensure publisher is not "ACM".

filtered_kbart_df = kbart_df.filter(
    (col("publication_type") == "Serial") &
    ((trim(col("date_last_issue_online")).isNull()) | (trim(col("date_last_issue_online")) == ""))
)

# Data extraction from "https://publishing.aip.org/publications/find-the-right-journal/"
response = requests.get(all_journals_aipp_url)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

# Step 3: Locate the table containing the journal information
table = soup.find("table", {"class": "journals-table"})

# Step 4: Extract the data from the table rows
journals = []

for row in table.find_all("tr")[1:]:  # Skip the header row
    columns = row.find_all("td")
    
    # Extract title and URL
    title_tag = columns[0].find("a")
    title = title_tag.get_text(strip=True) if title_tag else None
    title_url = title_tag["href"] if title_tag else None
    
    # Extract access type and ISSN details
    access_type_tag = columns[0].find("em")
    access_type = access_type_tag.get_text(strip=True) if access_type_tag else None
    issn_info = columns[0].find("p", class_="footnote").get_text(strip=True) if columns[0].find("p", class_="footnote") else None

    # Extract other fields
    topics = columns[1].get_text(strip=True) if len(columns) > 1 else None
    impact_factor = columns[2].get_text(strip=True) if len(columns) > 2 else None
    citations = columns[3].get_text(strip=True) if len(columns) > 3 else None
    frequency = columns[4].get_text(strip=True) if len(columns) > 4 else None
    submit_url = columns[5].find("a")["href"] if columns[5].find("a") else None

    # Add to journals list
    journals.append(Row(
        title=title,
        title_url=title_url,
        access_type=access_type,
        issn_info=issn_info,
        topics=topics,
        impact_factor=impact_factor,
        citations=citations,
        frequency=frequency,
        submit_url=submit_url
    ))

journal_df = spark.createDataFrame(journals, schema=schema)

# Apply the UDF to add print_issn and electronic_issn columns to the DataFrame
journal_df = journal_df.withColumn("issn_struct", extract_issn_udf(F.col("issn_info"))) \
                       .withColumn("print_issn", F.col("issn_struct.print_issn")) \
                       .withColumn("electronic_issn", F.col("issn_struct.electronic_issn")) \
                       .drop("issn_struct")

journal_df = journal_df.withColumn(
    "apc_url", 
    F.when(
        F.col("title_url").isNotNull() & (F.col("title_url") != ""), 
        F.concat(F.col("title_url"), F.lit("/pages/charges"))
    ).otherwise(F.lit(""))  # If title_url is null or empty, set apc_url to an empty string

# user define method to extract type of jounrl like gold and Dimand
def extract_journal_type(section_header):
    response = requests.get(open_access_details_url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
    div = soup.find("div", class_="content clearfix")
    journals = []
    section = div.find('h3', text=section_header)
    if section:
        ul = section.find_next_sibling('ul')
        if ul:
            for li in ul.find_all('li'):
                a_tag = li.find('a')
                if a_tag:
                    journal_name = a_tag.text.strip()
                    journal_url = a_tag.get('href').strip()
                    journals.append((journal_name, journal_url))
    return journals

# Extract Gold Open Access journals
gold_journals = extract_journal_type("Publishing in Gold Open Access Journals")
# Extract Diamond Open Access journals
diamond_journals = extract_journal_type("Diamond Open Access Journals")

for name, url in gold_journals:

diamond_rows = [Row(title=journal[0], url=journal[1], type="Diamond") for journal in diamond_journals]

# Create DataFrames from the Row objects
gold_df = spark.createDataFrame(gold_rows)
diamond_df = spark.createDataFrame(diamond_rows)

# Combine the two DataFrames
combined_df = gold_df.union(diamond_df)

# Show the combined DataFrame
combined_df.show(truncate=False)

# Add Journal Type (gold or diamond) to journal_df
result_df = journal_df.join(
    combined_df.select("title", "type"),  # Selecting relevant columns from apc_price_df
    on="title",  # Joining on the e_issn column
    how="left"    # Left join to retain all rows from all_journal_df
)

new_df = result_df.select(
    lit("American Institute of Physics (AIP)").alias("Publisher"),
    col("print_issn").alias("ISSN1"),
    col("electronic_issn").alias("ISSN2"),
    col("title").alias("Title"),
    lit("Publisher Website via Misc Publisher APCs list").alias("Source"),
    when(col("access_type") == "Open Access", lit("Fully OA")).otherwise(lit("None")).alias("Model"),
    lit("").alias("Model Notes"),
    when(col("type") == "Gold", lit(APC_OA)).when(col("type") == "Diamond", lit(APC_GOLD)).otherwise(lit(APC_HYBRID)).alias("APC"),
    lit("USD").alias("Currency"),
    lit("").alias("License Types"),
    lit(Year).alias("Year"),
    col("title_url").alias("Publisher URL"),
    col("title_url").alias("title_url"),
    lit("American Institute of Physics (AIP)").alias("Society"),
    lit("").alias("Imprint")
)

# Add product_id column
new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "PublisherID",
    F.expr("right(regexp_replace(title_url, '/current', ''), 3)")
)

# Add product_id column
new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "JoiningID",
    F.expr("right(regexp_replace(title_url, '/current', ''), 3)")
)

#getting model from filtered_kbart_df

new_df = new_df.join(filtered_kbart_df,
                     new_df['PublisherID'] == filtered_kbart_df['title_id'],
                      how="left"
                    ).select(new_df['*'],
                            col('access_type').alias("access_type_from_kbart")
                    )
new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "Model",
    when(col("access_type_from_kbart") == "Payment", lit("Hybrid"))
    .when(col("access_type_from_kbart") == "Free", lit("Fully OA"))
    .otherwise(col("Model"))
)

new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "LicenseType",
    when(col("Model") == "Fully OA", lit("CC BY"))
    .when(col("Model") == "Hybrid", lit("CC BY"))
    .otherwise(lit(""))
)
new_df.show(100, truncate=False)

society_df = spark.read.csv(society_path, header=True, inferSchema=True)

updated_df = new_df.alias("new").join(
    society_df.alias("society"), 
    trim(new_df["title"]) == trim(society_df["Title"]), 
    "left"
).select(
    new_df["*"], 
    coalesce(society_df["Society"], new_df["Society"]).alias("Updated_Society")
)

# Drop the old Society column and rename the updated one.
result_df = updated_df.drop("Society").withColumnRenamed("Updated_Society", "Society")

result_df.show(truncate=False)

desired_columns = [
    "Publisher", "ISSN1", "ISSN2", "Title", "Source", "Model", "Model Notes",
    "APC", "Currency", "License Types", "Year", "PublisherID", "JoiningID",
    "Imprint", "Society"
]

# Reorder the columns based on desired schema
df_reordered = result_df.select([col for col in desired_columns if col in new_df.columns])
df_reordered.show()
df_reordered.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").csv(silver_path, header=True,  encoding="UTF-8")

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Row
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType
from pyspark.sql.functions import regexp_extract, trim, when, col, lit

Year = '2025'

ALL_JOURNAL ='abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/Taylor & Francis/all/*.csv'
APC_PRICE = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/Taylor & Francis/price/*.csv'

SILVER_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Taylor & Francis/all/'

def get_all_dove_press_journals():
    # this needds to read from the property file
    dove_press_journals = "https://www.dovepress.com/author-guidelines/journal-publishing-fees"
    schema = StructType([
        StructField("title", StringType(), True),
        StructField("title_url", StringType(), True)
    ])

    response = requests.get(dove_press_journals)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

    journals_div = soup.find("div", {"class": "articles"})
    journals_list_all = journals_div.find_all("ul")

    # List to store journal names and URLs
    journals = []

    # Loop through each <ul> element and then each <li> within them
    for ul in journals_list_all:
        for li in ul.find_all("li"):
            a_tag = li.find("a")
            if a_tag:  # Only consider <li> with <a> tags (journals list)
                journal_name = a_tag.text.strip()
                journal_url = a_tag['href']
                journals.append(Row(
                    title=journal_name,
                    title_url=journal_url
                ))

    journals_df = spark.createDataFrame(journals, schema)
    return journals_df

def get_dove_press_issn_apc(url):
    url = "https://www.dovepress.com/" + url
    response = requests.get(url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
    body_div = soup.find("div", {"class": "tabs-padding group"})
    journal_apc_table = soup.find("table", {"class": "slats list-journal-pricing-band"})
    issn = body_div.find("h3").text.strip()

    
    usd_apc = None
    if journal_apc_table:
        rows = journal_apc_table.find_all("tr")
        if len(rows) > 1:
            usd_price_cell = rows[1].find_all("td")[0]
            usd_price = usd_price_cell.text.strip()

    return(usd_price,issn)

def enrich_dove_press_journals_issn_apc(dove_press_journals_df):
    # Get the ISSN and APC for each journal and return a plain string
    dove_press_journals_issn_apc_df = dove_press_journals_df.rdd.map(lambda row: Row(
        title=row.title,
        title_url=row.title_url,
        apc_issn=", ".join(get_dove_press_issn_apc(row.title_url))  # Combine APC and ISSN as a string
    )).toDF()

    return dove_press_journals_issn_apc_df

# Get all Dove Press journals
dove_press_journals_df = get_all_dove_press_journals()
dove_press_journals_df = enrich_dove_press_journals_issn_apc(dove_press_journals_df)

# Regular expressions
apc_pattern = r"US\$(\d+\.?\d*)"
issn_pattern = r"ISSN: (\d{4}-\d{4})"

# Extract APC_USD
dove_press_journals_df = dove_press_journals_df.withColumn("APC_USD", regexp_extract("apc_issn", apc_pattern, 1))

# Extract the first ISSN
dove_press_journals_df = dove_press_journals_df.withColumn("ISSN", regexp_extract("apc_issn", issn_pattern, 1))

all_journal_df = spark.read.option("header",True) \
    .option("delimiter",",") \
    .option("inferSchema",True) \
    .csv(ALL_JOURNAL)

price_df = spark.read.option("header",True) \
    .option("delimiter",",") \
    .option("inferSchema",True) \
    .csv(APC_PRICE)

merged_df = all_journal_df.join(
    price_df, 
    all_journal_df["issnOnline"] == price_df["Online ISSN"], 
    "left"  # Use "left" join to keep all rows from all_journal
)

# Select required columns
final_df = merged_df.select(
    all_journal_df["*"],  # All columns from all_journal
    #price_df["Ownership"], 
    price_df["List Price APC (USD)"]
)

# to get Dove press pirce

merged_with_Dove_df = final_df.join(
    dove_press_journals_df,
    trim(final_df["issnPrint"]) == trim(dove_press_journals_df["ISSN"]),
    "left"
)


final_with_Dove_df = merged_with_Dove_df.select(
    final_df["*"],
    dove_press_journals_df['APC_USD']
)

final_with_Dove_df = final_with_Dove_df.withColumn(
    "List Price APC (USD)", 
    when(col("imprint") == "Dove", col("APC_USD"))
    .otherwise(col("List Price APC (USD)"))  # Keep existing values if imprint is not 'Dove'
)

final_with_Dove_df = final_with_Dove_df.drop("APC_USD")

# Show the resulting DataFrame
final_with_Dove_df.show(truncate=False)

new_df = final_with_Dove_df.select(
    lit("Taylor & Francis").alias("Publisher"),
    col("issnPrint").alias("ISSN1"),
    col("issnOnline").alias("ISSN2"),
    col("title").alias("Title"),
    lit("Publisher Price List").alias("Source"),
    lit("").alias("Model Notes"),
    col("List Price APC (USD)").alias("APC"),
    lit("USD").alias("Currency"),
    lit(Year).alias("Year"),

def get_issn_eissn(journal_url):
    try:
        # Fetch the HTML content
        response = requests.get(journal_url)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, "html.parser")
       
        # Find the div containing the ISSN and eISSN
        div = soup.find("div", class_="overview__journal-owner-issn")
        # Extract ISSN and eISSN
        issn = div.find(string="ISSN:").find_next(string=True).strip() if div else None
        eissn = div.find(string="eISSN:").find_next(string=True).strip() if div else None
        return f"{issn}, {eissn}"
    except Exception as e:
        return None

def get_all_hybrid_journals():
    # Define schema for the DataFrame
    schema = StructType([
            StructField("journal_name", StringType(), True),
            StructField("journal_url", StringType(), True),
            StructField("price_GBP", StringType(), True),
            StructField("price_USD", StringType(), True),
            StructField("price_EUR", StringType(), True)
    ])

    response = requests.get(hybrid_journals_url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

    oa_jouranl_table = soup.find("table")
    table_rows = oa_jouranl_table.find_all("tr")[1:]
    # Initialize an empty list to store extracted data
    data = []
    # Loop through the rows to extract journal data
    for row in table_rows:
        columns = row.find_all("td")
        journal_name = columns[0].find("a").text
        journal_url = columns[0].find("a")["href"]
        apc_gbp = columns[1].text
        apc_usd = columns[2].text
        apc_eur = columns[3].text
        data.append((journal_name, journal_url, apc_gbp, apc_usd, apc_eur))
    # Create the DataFrame
    journal_df = spark.createDataFrame(data, schema=schema)

    return journal_df

journal_df = get_all_hybrid_journals()
# Register the function as a UDF
get_issn_eissn_udf = udf(get_issn_eissn, StringType())
journal_df = journal_df.withColumn("ISSN_eISSN", get_issn_eissn_udf(journal_df["journal_url"]))
journal_df = journal_df.withColumn("issn", split(journal_df["ISSN_eISSN"], ", ")[0]) \
       .withColumn("eissn", split(journal_df["ISSN_eISSN"], ", ")[1]) \
       .drop("ISSN_eISSN")
journal_df.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").csv(hybrid_journal_path, header=True,  encoding="UTF-8")

def get_all_platinum_journals():


    response = requests.get(platinum_journals_url)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

    platinum_jouranl_table = soup.find("table")

    # Extract titles and ISSNs
    rows = platinum_jouranl_table.find_all("tr")[1:]  # Skip the header row
    data = []
    for row in rows:
        cols = row.find_all("td")
        
        # First column
        title_1 = cols[0].text.strip()
        link_1 = cols[0].find("a")
        url_1 = link_1["href"] if link_1 else None
        issn_1 = cols[1].text.strip()

        # Second column
        title_2 = cols[2].text.strip()
        link_2 = cols[2].find("a")
        url_2 = link_2["href"] if link_2 else None
        issn_2 = cols[3].text.strip()

        data.append((title_1, issn_1, url_1))
        data.append((title_2, issn_2, url_2))

    # Define the schema
    columns = ["Title", "ISSN", "URL"]

    # Create PySpark DataFrame
    df = spark.createDataFrame(data, columns)

    return df

def populate_oajournal_df_from_json(input_data):
    # Ensure input is a dictionary
    if isinstance(input_data, str):
        data = json.loads(input_data)  # Parse JSON string
    elif isinstance(input_data, dict):
        data = input_data  # Use as is
    else:
        raise TypeError("Input must be a JSON string or a dictionary")
    # Extract the journal data
    journals = data.get("open_access_titles", [])
    journal_data = []
    journal_article_list_price = data.get("Open_Access_Pricing", {}).get("journal_article_list_price", None)
    
    for journal in journals:
        name = journal["name"]
        # Extract the title_id from the text within parentheses
        title_id = name[name.find("(")+1 : name.find(")")]
        journal_data.append((name, title_id, journal_article_list_price))
    
    # Define the schema
    schema = StructType([
        StructField("name", StringType(), True),
        StructField("title_id", StringType(), True),
        StructField("apc", StringType(), True)
    ])
    
    # Create a Spark DataFrame
    df = spark.createDataFrame(journal_data, schema=schema)
    return df

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

def explode_country(df, country_col, label_prefix):
    """Explode countries per author type and compute per-country weights."""
    exploded = (
        df
        .withColumn("country", F.explode(F.split(F.col(country_col), ",")))
        .where(F.col("country").isNotNull() & (F.col("country") != ""))
        .withColumn(
            f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}",
            F.lit(1.0) / F.size(F.array_distinct(F.split(F.col(country_col), ",")))
        )
        # Placeholder DOI columns
        .withColumn("doi_all", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "all"), F.col("doi")).otherwise(F.lit("")))
        .withColumn("doi_first", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "first"), F.col("doi")).otherwise(F.lit("")))
        .withColumn("doi_corresp", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "corresp"), F.col("doi")).otherwise(F.lit("")))
        .withColumn("doi_best", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "best_guess"), F.col("doi")).otherwise(F.lit("")))
        # Count flags
        .withColumn("count_all", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "all"), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))
        .withColumn("count_first", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "first"), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))
        .withColumn("count_corresp", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "corresp"), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))
        .withColumn("count_best", F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "best_guess"), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)))
        # Ensure *all* articles_per_country_* columns exist
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_all",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "all"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_first",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "first"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_corresp",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "corresp"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_best_guess",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "best_guess"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    )
    return exploded

# ---------------------------
# Create per-author-type country tables
# ---------------------------
all_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_all_authors", "all")
first_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_first_author", "first")
corresp_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_corresp_author", "corresp")

# best guess = corresp if present else first
df_best = df.withColumn(
    "country_codes_best_guess",
    F.when(F.col("country_codes_corresp_author").isNotNull() & (F.col("country_codes_corresp_author") != ""),
           F.col("country_codes_corresp_author"))
    .otherwise(F.col("country_codes_first_author"))
)
best_guess = explode_country(df_best, "country_codes_best_guess", "best_guess")

# ---------------------------
# Union all exploded tables
# ---------------------------
country_records = all_authors.unionByName(first_authors).unionByName(corresp_authors).unionByName(best_guess)

# ---------------------------
# Aggregate into country_totals
# ---------------------------
country_totals = (
    country_records.groupBy(
        "year", "oa_status", "country", "type", "type_crossref", "license", "version", "host_type"
    ).agg(
        F.countDistinct("doi").alias("articles"),
        F.countDistinct("doi_all").alias("articles_all"),
        F.countDistinct("doi_first").alias("articles_first"),
        F.countDistinct("doi_corresp").alias("articles_corresp"),
        F.countDistinct("doi_best").alias("articles_best"),
        F.sum("count_all").alias("count_all"),
        F.sum("count_first").alias("count_first"),
        F.sum("count_corresp").alias("count_corresp"),
        F.sum("count_best").alias("count_best"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_all").alias("articles_per_country_all"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_first").alias("articles_per_country_first"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_corresp").alias("articles_per_country_corresp"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_best_guess").alias("articles_per_country_best_guess")
    )
    .withColumnRenamed("country", "ISO2_Code")
    .orderBy("year", "oa_status", "ISO2_Code")
)

# ---------------------------
# Write output
# ---------------------------
country_totals.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(OUTPUT_PATH)

# =====================
# AUTHOR DATA
# =====================
author_exploded = (
    works_raw
    .select(
        F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
        F.explode_outer("authorships").alias("authorship")
    )
)

author_data = (
    author_exploded
    .select(
        "works_id",
        F.lit(1).alias("any_author"),
        (F.col("authorship.is_corresponding") == True).cast("int").alias("corresp_author"),
        (F.col("authorship.author_position") == "first").cast("int").alias("first_author"),
        F.col("authorship.countries").alias("country_code_array")
    )
)

# =====================
# COUNTRY INFO
# =====================
country_rows = author_data.withColumn("country_code", F.explode_outer("country_code_array"))

country_info = (
    country_rows
    .groupBy("works_id")
    .agg(
        F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list("country_code")))).alias("country_codes_all_authors"),
        F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_corresp_author"),
        F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_first_author"),
        F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(
            F.concat(
                F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull()),
                F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull())
            )
        ))).alias("country_codes_best_author"),
    )
)

# WORKS INFO
# =====================
def strip_openalex_id(col):
    return F.regexp_replace(col, "https://openalex.org/", "")

def strip_doi_url(col):
    return F.trim(F.regexp_replace(col, "https://doi.org/", ""))

cited_works_str = F.concat_ws(",", F.transform(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))),
                                               lambda x: strip_openalex_id(x)))
cited_works_count = F.size(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))))

journal_issns = F.concat_ws(",", F.col("primary_location.source.issn"))

topics_arr = F.slice(F.coalesce(F.col("topics"), F.array()), 1, 3)
topic_list = F.concat_ws(
    "",
    F.transform(topics_arr,
                lambda t: F.concat(strip_openalex_id(t["id"]), F.lit("|"), t["score"].cast("string"), F.lit(";")))
)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# safe Column for optional 'type_crossref'
type_crossref_col = F.col("type_crossref") if "type_crossref" in works_raw.columns else F.lit("")
# Safe Column for primary_topic.id
primary_topic_id_col = (
    F.col("primary_topic.id") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
)

# Safe Column for primary_topic.score
primary_topic_score_col = (
    F.col("primary_topic.score") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
)

# Safe JSON stringify for apc_paid
apc_paid_col = (
    F.to_json(F.col("apc_paid")) if "apc_paid" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
)

works_info = (
    works_raw.select(
        F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
        strip_openalex_id(F.col("id")).alias("id"),
        strip_doi_url(F.col("doi")).alias("doi"),
        F.col("publication_year").cast("string").alias("year"),
        F.col("type"),
        type_crossref_col.alias("type_crossref"),  # safe fallback
        F.col("is_paratext").cast("string").alias("is_paratext"),
        F.col("open_access.oa_status").alias("oa_status"),
        F.col("open_access.is_oa").alias("is_oa"),
        F.col("open_access.any_repository_has_fulltext").alias("in_repository"),
        #F.col("apc_paid"),
        apc_paid_col.alias("apc_paid"),
        #F.col("apc_paid"),
        F.when(F.col("is_retracted") == True, 1).otherwise(0).alias("is_retracted"),
        F.col("cited_by_count").cast("string").alias("cited_by_count"),
        F.when(F.size(F.col("referenced_works")) > 0, cited_works_str).otherwise(None).alias("cited_works"),
        cited_works_count.alias("cited_works_count"),
        strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_location.source.id")).alias("sources_id"),
        F.trim(F.col("primary_location.source.issn_l")).alias("journal_issn_l"),
        F.when(F.size(F.col("primary_location.source.issn")) > 0, journal_issns).otherwise(None).alias("journal_issns"),
        F.col("primary_location.source.display_name").alias("journal_name"),
        F.col("primary_location.source.type").alias("host_type"),
        F.col("primary_location.is_oa").alias("is_oa_hv"),
        F.col("primary_location.version").alias("version"),
        F.col("primary_location.license").alias("license"),
        strip_openalex_id(F.col("authorships")[0]["author"]["id"]).alias("first_author_id"),
        F.col("authorships")[0]["institutions"][0]["country_code"].alias("first_author_country_code"),
        strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_topic.id")).alias("primary_topic_id"),
        F.col("primary_topic.score").cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
        #primary_topic_id_col.alias("primary_topic_id"),
        #primary_topic_score_col.cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
        topic_list.alias("topic_list")
    )
)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.functions import broadcast

# =====================
# FINAL JOIN + FILTERS
# =====================

# If country_info is small (few MBs), broadcast it to avoid shuffle join
joined = (
    works_info.alias("wi")
    .join(broadcast(country_info.alias("ci")), "works_id", "left")
    .select(
        F.col("wi.id").alias("works_id"),
        "wi.doi", "wi.year", "wi.type", "wi.type_crossref", "wi.is_paratext",
        "wi.is_oa", "wi.oa_status", "wi.in_repository", "wi.apc_paid",
        "wi.sources_id",
        F.coalesce(
            "wi.journal_issn_l",
            F.when(F.col("wi.journal_issns").isNotNull(), F.substring("wi.journal_issns", 1, 9)),
            "wi.sources_id"
        ).alias("journal_issn_l"),
        "wi.journal_issns", "wi.journal_name",
        "wi.host_type", "wi.version", "wi.license", "wi.is_oa_hv",
        "wi.is_retracted", "wi.cited_by_count", "wi.cited_works", "wi.cited_works_count",
        "ci.country_codes_all_authors", "ci.country_codes_first_author",
        "ci.country_codes_corresp_author", "ci.country_codes_best_author",
        "wi.topic_list"
    )
)

# Apply filters in ONE step (more efficient)
final_filtered = (
    joined.filter(
        (F.col("doi").isNotNull()) &
        (
            F.col("journal_issn_l").isNotNull() |
            F.col("journal_issns").isNotNull() |
            F.col("journal_name").isNotNull() |
            F.col("sources_id").isNotNull()
        ) &
        (F.col("is_paratext") == "false") &
        (F.col("year").cast("int") > 1998) &
        (F.col("year").cast("int") < 2026)
    )
)

# =====================
# WRITE TO PARQUET
# =====================
(
    final_filtered
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("compression", "snappy")   # Efficient Parquet compression
    .partitionBy("year")               # Better than repartition("year")
    .parquet(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
)

print("✅ Transformation complete. Parquet files written to:", OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)

# Partitioning

pending_df = (
    spark.read.format("jdbc")
    .option("url", jdbc_url)
    .option("driver", "com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver")
    .option("dbtable", "(SELECT id, path FROM status_table WHERE status = 'pending') AS t")
    .option("user", mysql_user)
    .option("password", mysql_pass)
    .load()
)
pending_rows = pending_df.collect()

OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed/works_csv_final"

for row in pending_rows:
    row_id = row["id"]
    INPUT_JSON_PATH    = row["path"]
    print(f"Processing {INPUT_JSON_PATH}...")
    try:
        works_raw = spark.read.schema(works_schema).json(INPUT_JSON_PATH)

        # =====================
        # AUTHOR DATA
        # =====================
        author_exploded = (
            works_raw
            .select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                F.explode_outer("authorships").alias("authorship")
            )
        )

        author_data = (
            author_exploded
            .select(
                "works_id",
                F.lit(1).alias("any_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.is_corresponding") == True).cast("int").alias("corresp_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.author_position") == "first").cast("int").alias("first_author"),
                F.col("authorship.countries").alias("country_code_array")
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # COUNTRY INFO
        # =====================
        country_rows = author_data.withColumn("country_code", F.explode_outer("country_code_array"))

        country_info = (
            country_rows
            .groupBy("works_id")
            .agg(
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list("country_code")))).alias("country_codes_all_authors"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_corresp_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_first_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(
                    F.concat(
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull()),
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull())
                    )
                ))).alias("country_codes_best_author"),
            )
                )   
        # =====================
        # WORKS INFO
        # =====================
        def strip_openalex_id(col):
            return F.regexp_replace(col, "https://openalex.org/", "")

        def strip_doi_url(col):
            return F.trim(F.regexp_replace(col, "https://doi.org/", ""))

        cited_works_str = F.concat_ws(",", F.transform(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))),
                                                    lambda x: strip_openalex_id(x)))
        cited_works_count = F.size(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))))

        journal_issns = F.concat_ws(",", F.col("primary_location.source.issn"))

        topics_arr = F.slice(F.coalesce(F.col("topics"), F.array()), 1, 3)
        topic_list = F.concat_ws(
            "",
            F.transform(topics_arr,
                        lambda t: F.concat(strip_openalex_id(t["id"]), F.lit("|"), t["score"].cast("string"), F.lit(";")))
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F

        # safe Column for optional 'type_crossref'
        type_crossref_col = F.col("type_crossref") if "type_crossref" in works_raw.columns else F.lit("")
        # Safe Column for primary_topic.id
        primary_topic_id_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.id") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe Column for primary_topic.score
        primary_topic_score_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.score") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe JSON stringify for apc_paid
        apc_paid_col = (
            F.to_json(F.col("apc_paid")) if "apc_paid" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        works_info = (
            works_raw.select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("id")).alias("id"),
                strip_doi_url(F.col("doi")).alias("doi"),
                F.col("publication_year").cast("string").alias("year"),
                F.col("type"),
                type_crossref_col.alias("type_crossref"),  # safe fallback
                F.col("is_paratext").cast("string").alias("is_paratext"),
                F.col("open_access.oa_status").alias("oa_status"),
                F.col("open_access.is_oa").alias("is_oa"),
                F.col("open_access.any_repository_has_fulltext").alias("in_repository"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                apc_paid_col.alias("apc_paid"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                F.when(F.col("is_retracted") == True, 1).otherwise(0).alias("is_retracted"),
                F.col("cited_by_count").cast("string").alias("cited_by_count"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("referenced_works")) > 0, cited_works_str).otherwise(None).alias("cited_works"),
                cited_works_count.alias("cited_works_count"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_location.source.id")).alias("sources_id"),
                F.trim(F.col("primary_location.source.issn_l")).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("primary_location.source.issn")) > 0, journal_issns).otherwise(None).alias("journal_issns"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.display_name").alias("journal_name"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.type").alias("host_type"),
                F.col("primary_location.is_oa").alias("is_oa_hv"),
                F.col("primary_location.version").alias("version"),
                F.col("primary_location.license").alias("license"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("authorships")[0]["author"]["id"]).alias("first_author_id"),
                F.col("authorships")[0]["institutions"][0]["country_code"].alias("first_author_country_code"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_topic.id")).alias("primary_topic_id"),
                F.col("primary_topic.score").cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                #primary_topic_id_col.alias("primary_topic_id"),
                #primary_topic_score_col.cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                topic_list.alias("topic_list")
            )
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F
        from pyspark.sql.functions import broadcast

        # =====================
        # FINAL JOIN + FILTERS
        # =====================

        # If country_info is small (few MBs), broadcast it to avoid shuffle join
        joined = (
            works_info.alias("wi")
            .join(broadcast(country_info.alias("ci")), "works_id", "left")
            .select(
                F.col("wi.id").alias("works_id"),
                "wi.doi", "wi.year", "wi.type", "wi.type_crossref", "wi.is_paratext",
                "wi.is_oa", "wi.oa_status", "wi.in_repository", "wi.apc_paid",
                "wi.sources_id",
                F.coalesce(
                    "wi.journal_issn_l",
                    F.when(F.col("wi.journal_issns").isNotNull(), F.substring("wi.journal_issns", 1, 9)),
                    "wi.sources_id"
                ).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                "wi.journal_issns", "wi.journal_name",
                "wi.host_type", "wi.version", "wi.license", "wi.is_oa_hv",
                "wi.is_retracted", "wi.cited_by_count", "wi.cited_works", "wi.cited_works_count",
                "ci.country_codes_all_authors", "ci.country_codes_first_author",
                "ci.country_codes_corresp_author", "ci.country_codes_best_author",
                "wi.topic_list"
            )
        )

        # Apply filters in ONE step (more efficient)
        final_filtered = (
            joined.filter(
                (F.col("doi").isNotNull()) &
                (
                    F.col("journal_issn_l").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_issns").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_name").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("sources_id").isNotNull()
                ) &
                (F.col("is_paratext") == "false") &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") > 1998) &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") < 2026)
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # WRITE TO PARQUET
        # =====================

        # Check if Delta table already exists
        if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH):
            delta_table = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)

            # Merge into existing Delta table (upsert)
            (
                delta_table.alias("tgt")
                .merge(
                    final_filtered.alias("src"),
                    "tgt.works_id = src.works_id"   # match on works_id
                )
                .whenMatchedUpdateAll()
                .whenNotMatchedInsertAll()
                .execute()
            )
        else:
            # First time write
            (
                final_filtered.write
                .format("delta")
                .mode("overwrite")
                .partitionBy("year")
                .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
            )



        print(f"✅  Done with {INPUT_JSON_PATH}")

        conn = mysql.connector.connect(
            host=mysql_host,
            user=mysql_user,
            password=mysql_pass,
            database=mysql_db,
            port=3306
        )
        cur = conn.cursor()

        cur.execute("UPDATE status_table SET status='done' WHERE id=%s", (row_id,))
        conn.commit()

        cur.close()
        conn.close()

        print(f"✅  Updated the DB")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error in {INPUT_JSON_PATH}: {e}")

OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/works_csv_final"

for row in pending_rows:
    row_id = row["id"]
    INPUT_JSON_PATH    = row["path"]
    print(f"Processing {INPUT_JSON_PATH}...")
    try:
        works_raw = spark.read.schema(works_schema).json(INPUT_JSON_PATH)

        # =====================
        # AUTHOR DATA
        # =====================
        author_exploded = (
            works_raw
            .select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                F.explode_outer("authorships").alias("authorship")
            )
        )

        author_data = (
            author_exploded
            .select(
                "works_id",
                F.lit(1).alias("any_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.is_corresponding") == True).cast("int").alias("corresp_author"),
                (F.col("authorship.author_position") == "first").cast("int").alias("first_author"),
                F.col("authorship.countries").alias("country_code_array")
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # COUNTRY INFO
        # =====================
        country_rows = author_data.withColumn("country_code", F.explode_outer("country_code_array"))

        country_info = (
            country_rows
            .groupBy("works_id")
            .agg(
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list("country_code")))).alias("country_codes_all_authors"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_corresp_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code")))))).alias("country_codes_first_author"),
                F.concat_ws(",", F.array_sort(F.array_distinct(
                    F.concat(
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("corresp_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull()),
                        F.filter(F.collect_list(F.when(F.col("first_author") == 1, F.col("country_code"))), lambda x: x.isNotNull())
                    )
                ))).alias("country_codes_best_author"),
            )
                )   
        # =====================
        # WORKS INFO
        # =====================
        def strip_openalex_id(col):
            return F.regexp_replace(col, "https://openalex.org/", "")

        def strip_doi_url(col):
            return F.trim(F.regexp_replace(col, "https://doi.org/", ""))

        cited_works_str = F.concat_ws(",", F.transform(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))),
                                                    lambda x: strip_openalex_id(x)))
        cited_works_count = F.size(F.coalesce(F.col("referenced_works"), F.array().cast(ArrayType(StringType()))))

        journal_issns = F.concat_ws(",", F.col("primary_location.source.issn"))

        topics_arr = F.slice(F.coalesce(F.col("topics"), F.array()), 1, 3)
        topic_list = F.concat_ws(
            "",
            F.transform(topics_arr,
                        lambda t: F.concat(strip_openalex_id(t["id"]), F.lit("|"), t["score"].cast("string"), F.lit(";")))
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F

        # safe Column for optional 'type_crossref'
        type_crossref_col = F.col("type_crossref") if "type_crossref" in works_raw.columns else F.lit("")
        # Safe Column for primary_topic.id
        primary_topic_id_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.id") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe Column for primary_topic.score
        primary_topic_score_col = (
            F.col("primary_topic.score") if "primary_topic" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        # Safe JSON stringify for apc_paid
        apc_paid_col = (
            F.to_json(F.col("apc_paid")) if "apc_paid" in works_raw.columns else F.lit(None)
        )

        works_info = (
            works_raw.select(
                F.col("id").alias("works_id"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("id")).alias("id"),
                strip_doi_url(F.col("doi")).alias("doi"),
                F.col("publication_year").cast("string").alias("year"),
                F.col("type"),
                type_crossref_col.alias("type_crossref"),  # safe fallback
                F.col("is_paratext").cast("string").alias("is_paratext"),
                F.col("open_access.oa_status").alias("oa_status"),
                F.col("open_access.is_oa").alias("is_oa"),
                F.col("open_access.any_repository_has_fulltext").alias("in_repository"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                apc_paid_col.alias("apc_paid"),
                #F.col("apc_paid"),
                F.when(F.col("is_retracted") == True, 1).otherwise(0).alias("is_retracted"),
                F.col("cited_by_count").cast("string").alias("cited_by_count"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("referenced_works")) > 0, cited_works_str).otherwise(None).alias("cited_works"),
                cited_works_count.alias("cited_works_count"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_location.source.id")).alias("sources_id"),
                F.trim(F.col("primary_location.source.issn_l")).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                F.when(F.size(F.col("primary_location.source.issn")) > 0, journal_issns).otherwise(None).alias("journal_issns"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.display_name").alias("journal_name"),
                F.col("primary_location.source.type").alias("host_type"),
                F.col("primary_location.is_oa").alias("is_oa_hv"),
                F.col("primary_location.version").alias("version"),
                F.col("primary_location.license").alias("license"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("authorships")[0]["author"]["id"]).alias("first_author_id"),
                F.col("authorships")[0]["institutions"][0]["country_code"].alias("first_author_country_code"),
                strip_openalex_id(F.col("primary_topic.id")).alias("primary_topic_id"),
                F.col("primary_topic.score").cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                #primary_topic_id_col.alias("primary_topic_id"),
                #primary_topic_score_col.cast("string").alias("primary_topic_score"),
                topic_list.alias("topic_list")
            )
        )

        from pyspark.sql import functions as F
        from pyspark.sql.functions import broadcast

        # =====================
        # FINAL JOIN + FILTERS
        # =====================

        # If country_info is small (few MBs), broadcast it to avoid shuffle join
        joined = (
            works_info.alias("wi")
            .join(broadcast(country_info.alias("ci")), "works_id", "left")
            .select(
                F.col("wi.id").alias("works_id"),
                "wi.doi", "wi.year", "wi.type", "wi.type_crossref", "wi.is_paratext",
                "wi.is_oa", "wi.oa_status", "wi.in_repository", "wi.apc_paid",
                "wi.sources_id",
                F.coalesce(
                    "wi.journal_issn_l",
                    F.when(F.col("wi.journal_issns").isNotNull(), F.substring("wi.journal_issns", 1, 9)),
                    "wi.sources_id"
                ).alias("journal_issn_l"),
                "wi.journal_issns", "wi.journal_name",
                "wi.host_type", "wi.version", "wi.license", "wi.is_oa_hv",
                "wi.is_retracted", "wi.cited_by_count", "wi.cited_works", "wi.cited_works_count",
                "ci.country_codes_all_authors", "ci.country_codes_first_author",
                "ci.country_codes_corresp_author", "ci.country_codes_best_author",
                "wi.topic_list"
            )
        )

        # Apply filters in ONE step (more efficient)
        final_filtered = (
            joined.filter(
                (F.col("doi").isNotNull()) &
                (
                    F.col("journal_issn_l").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_issns").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("journal_name").isNotNull() |
                    F.col("sources_id").isNotNull()
                ) &
                (F.col("is_paratext") == "false") &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") > 1998) &
                (F.col("year").cast("int") < 2026)
            )
        )

        # =====================
        # WRITE TO DELTA TABLE
        # =====================

        if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH):
            # Append to existing Delta table
            (
                final_filtered.write
                .format("delta")
                .mode("append")
                .partitionBy("year")   # optional: only needed if you want partitioning
                .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
            )
        else:
            # First time write
            (
                final_filtered.write
                .format("delta")
                .mode("overwrite")   # create new table
                .partitionBy("year")
                .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
            )

        print(f"✅  Done with {INPUT_JSON_PATH}")

        conn = mysql.connector.connect(
            host=mysql_host,
            user=mysql_user,
            password=mysql_pass,
            database=mysql_db,
            port=3306
        )
        cur = conn.cursor()

        cur.execute("UPDATE status_table SET status='done' WHERE id=%s", (row_id,))
        conn.commit()

        cur.close()
        conn.close()

        print(f"✅  Updated the DB")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error in {INPUT_JSON_PATH}: {e}")

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit

# ---------------------
# Spark Session
# ---------------------

# ---------------------
# File paths
# ---------------------
file1 = "abfss://general@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/MS_Crossref_tidy/titleFile (2).csv"
file2 = "abfss://general@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/MS_Crossref_tidy/titleFile (1).csv"

# ---------------------
# Load both CSVs
# ---------------------
df1 = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(file1)
df2 = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(file2)

# Add source markers (to identify later)
df1 = df1.withColumn("source", lit("file1"))
df2 = df2.withColumn("source", lit("file2"))

# ---------------------
# Compare Data
# ---------------------
# Find rows in df1 not in df2
diff1 = df1.subtract(df2)

# Find rows in df2 not in df1
diff2 = df2.subtract(df1)

# Union differences
diff = diff1.union(diff2)

# ---------------------
# Check and Report
# ---------------------
if diff.count() == 0:
    print("NO DIFFERENCE: Both files are identical ✅")
else:
    print("DIFFERENCE FOUND ❌")
    diff.show(truncate=False)  # shows different rows

OUTPUT_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/works_short/"
df = spark.read.format("delta").load(OUTPUT_PATH)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, length, max as spark_max

# Get all string columns (you can include numeric if you want)
string_cols = [f.name for f in df.schema.fields if f.dataType.simpleString() == 'string']

# Compute max length for each string column
exprs = [spark_max(length(col(c))).alias(c) for c in string_cols]

max_lengths_df = df.select(*exprs)

# Show the results
max_lengths_df.show(truncate=False)
